title: Firework++ - Longer Craftable Durations!
description: Additional firework booster crafting recipes for elytra! Longer flight times with more gunpowder!
body:
> If this project helped you, please consider leaving some stars [on the Github](https://github.com/Derec-Mods)!

# Longer Firework Durations, Craftable!
This datapack adds vanilla friendly firework recipes that expand on the existing ones for the Elytra! Now players can craft using more gunpowder, for longer flight times!

![Firework crafting recipe from this datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3043bc7267006c33b35573fff458664928959bbf.png)

Created for the UT Austin Minecraft server, derex smp.

## Join our dev discord!
